text.title: Status Report Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce the four audience-tailored reports from one source.

step.name: refresh-source
step.action: Update milestone, RAG, owner, due date, blocker note, budget for the week. ALL hand-edits go here.

step.name: resolve-audience-map
step.action: For each stakeholder, look up audience role → template. Reject "all templates to one person" entries.

step.name: generate-four
step.action: For each template, render from source. CEO: 5-line cap. PMO: RAG table first. Sponsor: scope+blockers+decisions. Leadership: translated narrative (no component names).
step.decision-gate: If CEO > 5 lines OR Leadership contains raw technical → re-edit before send.

step.name: review-and-validate
step.action: Run validator on emission record. Quick visual scan: same RAG across reports, business-impact present in Leadership, blockers present in Sponsor.

step.name: deliver
step.action: Send via the configured channel per audience (email / Slack / portal). Record delivered_at in emissions array.
